DP.507.0000:
If you’ve got Pokémon with you,
it’s safe for even a kid like you\r
to go off traveling alone.
DP.507.0001:
I had a battle the other day,
and my Pokémon’s HP got low,\f
and I thought we were done for,\f
and then, all of a sudden, my Pokémon
ate the Berry it was holding! Whew!
DP.507.0002:
We’re kinda close to Eterna City,
but it’s still quite far away.\f
You should be prepared for a long
journey.
